summary: Tested Work Schedule Generator feature (Töögraafik). All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle/Description accessibility attributes (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent to fix accessibility warning
seed_data_creation: Backend tests use TEST_ prefix for custom rates and reset via /api/presets/reset
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Schedule Generator feature is fully functional. Backend productivity API tested via pytest. Frontend WorkScheduleDialog tested via Playwright. All key features verified.

backend.description: Default values match maalaus TES standards
All 7 categories present: Maalaus, Katto, Lattia, Rakennus, Kotelot, Ovet, Pystykotelot
Custom rates saved and retrieved from MongoDB
Individual rate values can be updated

frontend.test: 'Töögraafik' menu item visible in overflow menu
WorkScheduleDialog opens when menu item clicked
Empty state message 'Ei mittauksia' displays when no measurements
Worker count input hidden in empty state
Hours/day input hidden in empty state
'Muokkaa tuottavuutta' button hidden in empty state
PDF export button hidden in empty state

backend_productivity_api.GET /api/presets/productivity: Returns 21 default maalaus TES rates with categories: Maalaus, Katto, Lattia, Rakennus, Kotelot, Ovet, Pystykotelot
backend_productivity_api.PUT /api/presets/productivity: Saves custom rates to MongoDB, supports upsert

frontend_work_schedule_dialog.empty_state: Shows 'Ei mittauksia. Lisää mittauksia projektiin ensin.' message with AlertCircle icon
frontend_work_schedule_dialog.productivity_editor: 'Muokkaa tuottavuutta' button (data-testid='toggle-rates-editor') toggles rates editor panel

pdf_export_function.features: Company header with logo, project info block, schedule table with columns (Työvaihe, Määrä, Tuottavuus, Tunnit, Päivät), summary totals section, footer with company name

server.py.lines_141-213: Productivity rates endpoints with DEFAULT_PRODUCTIVITY_RATES (21 items)
server.py.GET_endpoint: @api_router.get('/presets/productivity') returns rates from MongoDB or defaults
server.py.PUT_endpoint: @api_router.put('/presets/productivity') saves rates to MongoDB with upsert

WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_106-220: Dialog component with loading state and empty state handling
WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_240-282: Settings row with worker count, hours/day inputs, and toggle-rates-editor button
WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_284-312: Productivity rates editor panel with editable rate inputs
WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_314-351: Schedule table showing work phases with hours calculations
WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_352-381: Totals section showing totalHours, totalHoursPerWorker, totalDays, totalWeeks
WorkScheduleDialog.js.lines_383-396: Actions row with Sulje and PDF export buttons

Toolbar.js.lines_98-104: Töögraafik menu item with Calendar icon in secondaryActions array

App.js.lines_996-1001: WorkScheduleDialog component with open, onClose, measurements, projectName props

export.js.lines_1479-1667: exportWorkSchedulePDF function generates professional PDF with company branding
